blended.narrative: Schweitzer is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.1 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 2,377 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 4" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
Tomorrow: 2.3" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 11" over the past week. Current depth: 65".
